description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The ramp features a smooth, curved wooden surface for skating, flanked by sturdy side walls with black and white finishes, one of which is decorated with graffiti art. Both ends of the ramp are equipped with metal guardrails for safety, and there are elevated platforms at each end for skaters to start or rest. The structure is supported by a solid base, likely reinforced for stability, and the wood surface is designed for durability and smooth riding. The overall design is modern and functional, catering to skateboarders, BMX riders, and scooter users.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails, graffiti art, and elevated platforms at both ends. The structure is robust and designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black stone-textured base, wooden ramp surface, and metal guardrails at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full curved ramp, graffiti art on the left wall, and both elevated platforms with guardrails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a black base and visible guardrails, but from the opposite end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ramp curve, white wall, and both platforms, with less visible graffiti.
